lever: de-delegate node version to in-process nx-exact algorithm via shared _flow_matrix_row (the edge variant already does this); drops per-call fnx->nx conversion and nx-backend-dispatch dependency
bench_notes: host is noisy (rch swarm). warm min-of-N, two windows: window A new 375.5ms vs genuine nx 379.0ms (parity); window B old-delegated 281.7ms -> new-inprocess 263.2ms (1.07x self). The de-delegation removes the fnx->nx conversion; the residual vs-nx delta lives in the shared dense _FullInverseLaplacian (np.linalg.inv, O(n^3)) which is numpy/LAPACK-bound and identical to nx's path.
next_target: _FullInverseLaplacian dense inverse / matrix_exp_symmetric eigensolver — shared current-flow + spectral primitive; needs a safe-Rust blocked LU/eigensolver to beat LAPACK constant factor
